narrative:
Hudson 3-D (precinct in Summit County) has 1,117 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
